nativeProps: React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>, excluding type, value, defaultValue, maxLength, and native onChange

props.name: purpose
props.type: reusable-secret; deliberately prevents an implicit OTP interpretation

props.name: pasteBlockedMessage
props.default: localized Pasting is disabled for this PIN field.

compositionPolicy.native: One real password or text input owns focus, editing, selection, caret, composition, paste, password-manager discovery, validation, form submission, and reset.
compositionPolicy.purpose: The required reusable-secret purpose is also asserted at runtime, and its programmatic description makes this contract explicitly distinct from OtpField and one-time-code autofill.
compositionPolicy.display: Secure uses native type=password; visible uses native type=text. Display mode never changes the canonical numeric value.
compositionPolicy.paste: Allow is the default and reads only the current paste event text to normalize a bounded insertion without logging, persistence, or transmission. Block is an explicit consumer policy that cancels paste and announces a localized message without reading clipboard data.
compositionPolicy.completion: Completion is an optional notification for each newly complete value; an unchanged complete value is not announced twice and no authentication action is inferred.
compositionPolicy.segments: Decorative character guides are aria-hidden and never become focus targets or independent fields.
compositionPolicy.field: ID, label, description, error, required, and invalid relationships are inherited from Field unless explicitly supplied.
